findings: Monitor expects telemetry.*_launched with fallback to launch_proof.*_started; naming mismatch can trigger false no-proof warnings.
Monitor hardcodes "full SS-250" label even if swarm-state.json targets differ.
Incomplete proof warning only triggers when status=success; partial status with low counts lacks warning.
Atoms displayed as atoms/250 but README does not define atoms in telemetry contract.
Monitor never reads child-agents.jsonl despite README stating launch proof uses it.
